name: Lasagna Rolls
recipeIngredient: 1 Tablespoon Water or Dry Red Wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble the Italian Sausage into a 1-quart casserole dish.
2. Stir in the chopped onion.
3. Cook on high power for 3 to 4 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the sausage is fully cooked and the onion is tender.
4. Remove from heat and stir in the beaten egg, cream-style cottage cheese, and grated Parmesan cheese.
5. Spread a thin layer of the meat-cheese mixture onto each lasagna noodle.
6. Roll up each noodle into a jelly-roll style, starting with the short edge.
7. Place seam side down in a small greased baking dish.
8. Mix together the pizza sauce and water or dry red wine.
9. Pour the sauce mixture over the lasagna rolls in the baking dish.
10. Cook on high power for 4 to 5 minutes until the lasagna rolls are heated through, stirring occasionally.
11. Sprinkle shredded mozzarella cheese over the lasagna rolls.
12. Cook for an additional 30 seconds to 1 minute until the cheese is just melted.
